scripts.deck:serve: npm run deck:build:html && python3 -m http.server 3000 -d decks/build/
scripts.deck:prebuild: rm -rf decks/build/images decks/build/js && cp -r decks/images decks/build/images && cp -r decks/js decks/build/js
scripts.deck:build:html: marp decks/retail-forecast.md --html -o decks/build/retail-forecast.html && npm run deck:prebuild
